游戏总体还行，但是有很多槽点。 一个传送道具要150，正常一个怪掉不到5块钱，实在无法理解，地图上传送点又少，大部分篝火间不能传送，没钱你就跑去吧，反正我是直接加入宗门拉满。 大部分箱子感觉都是垃圾，回血药回蓝药全塞箱子里是什么毛病，跳半天过去发现是两瓶药可太开心了。 还有装备，非得搞这么多负面效果恶心我么，你可以数值低，别给我搞成负的啊，每次捡个新装备都得纠结，最后就是懒得换。 然后就是任务指引，不能说是少的可怜，只能说是基本没有。 最后这游戏的剧情也有好多莫名其妙的点，只能说烛龙你真的不是找了个便宜外包么。 就这样吧，游戏玩起来还是挺上头的，40+小时打完了隐藏结局，但是游戏真的有太多应该做好但却没有打磨过的地方了。 古剑4好好做啊混蛋！！！

★★☆☆☆☆☆ 玩惯《死亡细胞》再来玩这个，落差直接拉满。怪物碰撞判定离谱至极，手感烂到让人反胃。我本就只看重操作体验，结果全程操作僵硬、反馈拉胯，毫无乐趣。空有外表，核心玩法一塌糊涂，不推荐入手。

很平庸的一个游戏，游玩过程中可以感受到制作组有很大的野心，但也许是经验和能力不够，也可能是项目管理出了问题，最终呈现出的效果有很多问题。 [h1] 1.探索方面[/h1]体验是最严重的，也是最糟糕的。地图虽然做得非常大，但是很空，有非常多无意义的小岔路和弯弯绕绕，想完全探索一张地图需要花费大量的时间，但并不能得到足够的探索反馈，探索过程中大多数时候的反馈就是一些打钱的矿石和血药之类的东西。如果中期能给一个类似于夜之仪式里那个和忍者赛跑以后获得的跑得超快的技能的话，地图问题会改善很多，但没有，这就导致大多数时候的探索都是很乏味——探索让玩家感到乏味，我觉得这对类银河城游戏来说是致命的问题； [h1] 2.战斗方面 [/h1]不知道是不是因为我玩的时候制作组大幅调低了数值，感觉从中期开始就成了割草游戏，我也没刻意刷级，莫名其妙就等级碾压了，boss跟小怪站撸就杀了。但很窝火的一点是我的进攻老是被敌人打断，要是有个霸体类饰品就好了，至少我能割草割得很爽； [h1] 3.整体设计 [/h1]我能感觉出来制作组是想往恶魔城的方向靠的，但我理解不了地图为什么不学恶魔城设计成那种房间式的地图，已有的这种地图设计刷起来真的很不方便，完全失去恶魔城那种刷刷刷的乐趣，我觉得这是很大的一个设计失误； [h1] 4.画面方面 [/h1]虽然后期看习惯了，但我不得不说这画面有一种奇怪的廉价感，解释不来，但观感确实感觉很廉价，没有独特的风格； [h1] 5.剧情方面 [/h1]确实看得出来想认真做，但是探索方面的问题太严重了，大大降低了玩家在品味剧情时候的连贯感，导致我完全没兴趣看剧情。而且有一说一，配音挺烂的，其实不如不做； [h1] 6.音乐方面 [/h1]完全没有存在感，我到后期实在腻了索性自己放歌听； [h1] 总地来说[/h1]是一款[b] 步子迈得太大 结果扯着蛋[/b]的游戏，很可惜，但确实游玩价值不高。

For 5€ bucks on a sale its a good metroidvania, cant go wrong with it if you arent expecting a silksong. It doesn't do anything Unique or whatever, but its  just a good 30~ hours to get all achieves. Environment looks quite pretty. Story was hard for me to follow completely but i admittedly wasnt invested to begin with. Only thing that i really noticed being negative is early bosses being very easy and endings ignoring sound settings, my ears werent amused. You can pogo a lot of things to explore the map LOTS and the world is  surprisingly big, filled with hidden items / rewards. Also has a talent tree but the game would have been the same without it honestly.  If you like the trailers and screenshots on the store page, and have played a 2dcastlevania before you know exactly what you are diving into: no suprises, neither good nor bad. Solid.

感觉像粘了屎的巧克力。装备就非要加一堆负面作用恶心人，战斗体验一般般，量大管饱可能算是个优点，但后期全收集也烦，剧情方面：剧情是什么，文本量太大有点懒得看。任务指引还有道具的描述就有点莫名其妙，基本上捡到了回血，饰品槽，后像槽都不知道这些是干嘛的。

缺点明显： 一、地图无意义地大，就好像要刻意填满范围内每一个空隙一样，让你在一条直线上蛇形行走 二、怪物过高的接触伤害比怪物本身的攻击威胁更大，冲刺无无敌更是无限放大了这个问题，并多处在只容一人身高通过的通道放怪，因为你无法用冲刺越过而强迫你打 三、稀烂的装备系统，不同于其他银河城装备百花齐放都能玩，这里装备更像神之天平等和JRPG那种上位淘汰下位，有着明显同类型迭代的系统，捡到一个武器用不了多久就要换，强化武器带来的提升又微乎其微 四、超级烂的引导，打通关我都有2个厨师没从来没遇到过，打到大后期还是只有一个饰品格子，物品上没有暗示使用场景，谜语一样的物品描述，很佩服第一个打通这游戏的人在没有任何攻略的情况下到底摸索了多久 五、在银河城里搞谜之搓招，关键是搓招收益远不如直接平A，还有谜之搓招判定，↑→攻击的搓招从来没成功按错来过，倒是空战时不想按出来却经常误触发，你真正想去搓出来却死活搓不出 六、部分地图没有地图，强制重复跑图拖时间，点名影塔，泪湖基地，还有船夫坐船动画明明可以直接切一下画面加载一下直接跳过却要玩家等上十几二十秒，毫无意义地浪费时间 七、刻意模仿借鉴其他作品的地方太多，缺乏自己的东西，连探索能力都照搬，大扣分  优点：量大管饱

Afterimage becomes a good game after taking its time to get there.  Also if you get lost and don't get the exploration upgrades, it makes the game feel glacial as the maps get bigger and bigger. It's very easy to end up going the wrong way during the mid game  Hour 0-10: Nice art and music. Gameplay seems a bit too simplistic and too easy Hour 11-20: I'm officially lost but having more fun because combat is suddenly a lot tougher in zones I am out leveled for. Hour 21-30: Exploration is now officially fun as I take my time to check out every little nook and cranny. Also the story and characters start to grow on me ever so slightly after having little interest up to this point. Hour 31+: Oh NOW the game is cookin but it's not long after before the game is complete.

太好玩了，我认为在类银中仅次于神之天平，尤其推荐剧情党玩，收集道具探索世界真相，到结局谜底全部解开的过程很爽  美术、音乐制作和声优都是顶级，更加强化了探索世界的代入感和乐趣（强烈推荐日语语音，雷妮是三笠声优，伊芙是皮卡丘声优，两个人演出非常出色）  游戏性方面，主角的成长性非常强，从前期的残疾到后期的高性能主角乱杀，成长的爽感可能只有天平，细胞和苍翼能比拟（我要吐槽现在大部分类银游戏主角都是从头残疾到尾）  关于很多评论诟病的跳跳乐：除了一两个地方比较逆天，本作跳跳乐其实难度不算高，难度大概约等于亵渎二＜空洞＜＜＜终末莉莉。  遗憾发售时逆天差评太多，导致项目组不太重视游戏的后续了，真心希望项目组做完古剑4还能回来做两个锁着的门甚至二周目的dlc

不管是女主的动作还是战斗的设计，都很廉价，平a没什么连段，基本就一两段攻击，然后有一些很抽象的“特性”小怪在斜坡会很快的滑下来，创你身上，电梯不是按键，而是踩一脚才能上下，就弄得探图很不方便，而且你站在电梯下面，电梯碰到你的头会直接回去，大概是bug 然后每张地图只有一个传送点，剩下的是不具备传送功能的保存点，你如果想在野外传送，或者想去小的保存点就得花300块买个传送药（自杀药），只能说意义不明，游戏设计了大地图，但是没有小地图，你要频繁按地图键开地图，但是配合上你游的垃圾UI，开地图闪一堆泡泡硬控你一秒简直折磨 最逆天的就是装备系统了，初始有把剑和套装，后续的有木，铜武器，还有鲜花，矿石系列装备（刚玩到这），鲜花套装少了一个头环，要去刷一个法师，矿石少了护腿，要刷一个好战喵灵，你不会觉得每一套藏个东西让你找不到很好玩？给的怪物图鉴只能看到你获得的掉落物，意思是我不刷出这装备我就不知道这个怪掉这件装备，我是看了攻略知道了掉落物，问题是爆率也不高啊 上面的是装备，只加一些数值，影响不大，那我问你，地图里能找到青铜剑，大剑，鞭子，镰刀，刀，结果双刀叫我自己刷是几个意思，这东西也不是什么稀有装备，就一个前期套装，拿不到只用木双刀又很影响体验，你是觉得双刀好用占模，就给了一个新人几乎找不到的获取方式是吗？ 总结一下的话，游戏完成度不高，很多莫名很奇妙的地方，正反馈少，负反馈多，搞得没什么玩下去的欲望，还有莫名其妙的刷装备环节，一整套总要藏个一两件，100%地图探索率不等于全收集，不等式秒了

优点：量大管饱 缺点：大而无当  第二次体验这游戏，感觉真是一言难尽。 没了初次玩那种糟心的感觉，却对它的缺点感受更深了。 总体而言前期平淡，中期好转，中后期疲惫，后期对地图的规模之大发出由衷的感叹。 但无论如何，它总是很难让人说出一个好字。 管饱，管饱，它仿佛就只是饿的没吃的时候的上好选择罢了。  这种类型的游戏中有个很很重要的点就是，想要有好的探索感，移速与地图大小必需是匹配的，并且最好是小而慢。无论是恶魔城、银河战士还是空洞骑士它们都遵循着这一原则。而不遵循的银河战士：生存恐惧，机动性过高，地图完全不经探，使整个流程特别显短。 而心渊梦境正好相反，它的移速对比地图大小太慢了点。必需算上冲刺，探图速度才和其它游戏走路相当，所以跑图是很吃力的。再加上它尝试了盐与避难所式的设计——整个地图无缝衔接，不会像空洞等其它游戏那样会切图。所以更加显得地图之庞大，移速之缓慢。 更致命的是，盐1这种无缝地图采用的是魂式设计，主打一个前路艰险步步为营和柳暗花明又一村。而心渊梦境虽然无缝，但设计思路依然是老恶魔城那一套。最终结果就是，无缝地图、恶魔城的地图设计思路与失调的地图大小与移速，这三者共同造就了心渊梦境的现状，好----一个量大管饱。  差评不至于，好评嘛，也不想给。但在steam这种只能好坏二选一的评价体系下，那就好评吧。

全体的にはまあまあ。推せるところは、探索と、兼ね役も多いみたいだがモブにまでボイスがついてる事。ボス戦が微妙で、予備動作が分かりにくい上に、SE等も使われてないのが強さになっちゃってるのがいるが、回復のごり押しで大半がどうにかなっちゃうのがナントモ。念願の無敵ステップもCT制とかいう謎だし。また、ファストトラベルも微妙で、探索とアスレチックの時間が長いので、そこが無理な人には向いていない。

说实话，我没玩过类银河城游戏。《心渊梦境》最初吸引我的，完完全全是它的画风。美术完全长在了我的审美点上，以至于我甘愿对这款游戏的一切瑕疵自带一层爱的滤镜，称得上是瑕不掩瑜。 先说小优点。作为一款动作类游戏，女主角的整套动作设计很飒爽，视觉体验出色。 然而，落到实际战斗体验中，却天差地别。 槽点之多，不吐不快。。。。。。 最反直觉的一点，就是游戏的闪避没有无敌帧。我不确定其他同类游戏是否也这样，但就前期体验来说，这个设计着实不够友好。再加上游戏前期的机动性极其贫瘠，玩家长时间内只有一段跳。这个跳跃高度非常尴尬，大部分时候刚好擦着怪物头顶过去，极容易吃到碰撞伤害，甚至精准撞上怪物头顶喷出的弹幕。我严重怀疑这是刻意的设计，而这些设计都需要一定的时间成本去适应。 除此之外，战斗体验拉胯的另一大元凶，在于精英怪和BOSS的设计。几乎所有BOSS和精英怪都是零帧起手，出招速度极快。尤其大部分怪物拥有两种甚至更多的攻击手段，但不同招式的前摇动作几乎没有区别，玩家根本无法通过动作预判进行闪避。面对这种战斗设计，其实只剩下两种玩法。 1.纯靠背板，记住BOSS的出招顺序。 2.全程无脑乱跳，苟等BOSS出现僵直，再偷偷摸一刀——这种玩法彻底丢掉了动作游戏操作乐趣。 总结，想打出行云流水的操作通关，门槛较高。 再来谈谈难度。普通模式下，玩家几乎不用练什么操作，直接硬吃伤害，利用受伤的无敌帧就能莽死BOSS，毫无操作感可言。真正比较有游戏体验的，是进阶难度。该模式下怪物的伤害和防御大幅提升，还增添了一条陷阱掉血的机制，也就逼迫着你去认真练习操作、熟悉机制。可问题又绕了回来：新手若开局直接选进阶难度，前期容易直接被劝退。 好在游戏内可以直接修改难度模式，这点算得上人性化。 那么，有没有办法正常地玩下去呢？有的。只要你学会在拿到二段跳或者特定强势技之前，坦然承认自己就是条“蛆”，摆正心态，大概就能玩得足够淡然了。 以上难免带了些个人抱怨（或许也是大部分差评的来由），下面则是对这款游戏更为具体的评价，不保证全面与泛用。 先补充战斗方面的核心——武器系统。仅说主武器，共有六类，简单点评： 1.单手剑：没什么存在感，可能面板数值还算不错，跳A弹幕长，手感不错，但也仅此而已。 2.鞭子：我个人不喜欢用，空中硬控自己，手感僵硬。 3.双刀：神中神。手感极佳，堪称空战王者，跳跃即输出。双刀几乎无前摇，不仅可以挥砍挡掉弹幕，也不会像某些武器那样还没打出就被打断。不管清图还是打BOSS，都极其好用。 哦对了，关于被打断这一点，这个游戏几乎不存在霸体，搓招被打断绝对是常态。 4.太刀：请输入文本。最轮椅的一集，因此不做评价。 5.大剑：这个武器比较尴尬，前摇很长，伤害尚可。我带它唯一的用途就是弹反，但这个弹反判定极为严苛，几乎不能单靠反应格挡成功，大部分是背板失误时用来救急的，或者可以面对特定的BOSS用作对策，还算有不错的实用价值。 6.镰刀：中规中矩。 游戏设有两个主武器槽位，但两把主武器之间的联动比较难评。这款游戏的战斗上限在于“取消键”——理论上，若能善用取消后摇或技能覆盖的机制，可以打出极其帅气的操作，DPS也会成倍上升。但这对正常人来说实在太难，玩个游戏和弹钢琴一样。 而且平心而论，游戏的战斗内容并没有太多能发挥这种上限的余地。各类简单粗暴的玩法，也进一步稀释了钻研的价值：双刀、镰刀的灌伤流，或是太刀无脑干翻一切，都能轻松通关。除此之外，多段跳水滴、鬼畜剑等趣味玩法也层出不穷，战斗方式完全由玩家自由选择。 接下来说说主线探索。 游戏的主线探索占大头，一些物品能够直接改变游戏的体验，比如强力武器，改善开荒体验；爬墙和高跳，直接让探图变得呼吸般简单；双刀的升龙舞，太刀的刹那，直接拔高了武器的战斗权重；还有死斗的拼刀，红冲无敌，能让玩家从原始人进化成外星人。 游戏的地图大多是无缝衔接，自由度较高，每个地图风格迥异，少有重复模板。但引导性极差。地图里还有大量需要钻缝、寻找隐藏房间的设计，如果不了解这游戏的尿性，很容易卡关。而且全图传送点数量稀少，频繁跑图格外耗费时间，很容易消磨游玩兴致。加上一些跳跳乐......其实大部分还挺有意思，但少部分真的极其刁难。在“引水渠”这张图，制作组的恶意便已逐渐展现，所幸关键物品的获取难度都不算太高。 引导差真的是个很大的问题。前期剧情发散，让人毫无头绪，世界观设定没有详细解释，捡到的许多物品压根不知道有什么用，极易劝退。我甚至玩到一半时，才知道符文可以增加治疗法术的使用次数。 但这个游戏，其实是典型的低开高走。从慢热到爆发，后期节奏逐渐加快。世界观完整且能形成闭环，格局也颇为宏大。只是剧情插入比较生硬，有时几个小时碰不到一个剧情点，有时又密集得过分。好在剧情的包装很美，人物感情真挚。而且大量的文本、细节、世界观解释，都藏在物品描述与人物对话里。不少文案写得很有味道，彩蛋也很可爱。 最后，个人看法，这款游戏其实不错，优缺点都非常明显。降价情况下性价比很高。
玩游戏首先得要快乐，但是这游戏感觉不到，没有多年脑血栓症状是设计不出这种地图，没有一点探图的欲望。

Судя по оценкам, перед нами один из лучших представителей жанра "метроидвания". Давайте разберёмся, так ли это.  В этом мире, пережившем некую катастрофу или скорее потоп, большая часть человечества была смыта потоком душ. Люди могут переродиться из потока, но для этого требуется помощь друга.  Мы играем за потерявшую память девушку, которая единственная способна самостоятельно возрождаться. Вернувшись в родное селение, девушка узнаёт, что наставница погибла, а её душа украдена. Произошедшее нельзя пустить на самотёк, и наша героиня бросается в погоню за похитительницей.  [h3]Для начала о плюсах:[/h3]  [list] [*]Прекрасный визуальный стиль, создающий атмосферу сказки. Хочется отметить хорошую читаемость героини и врагов на экране. [*]Приятная музыка. [*]Отзывчивое управление. Но не без изъянов. [/list]  [h3]Теперь о минусах:[/h3]  Сюжет в игре такой же водянистый, как поток, в который окунается героиня. По ходу действия сценаристы будут добавлять всё новых персонажей, говорящих загадочными, ничего не значащими фразами, создавая видимость глубокого лора. Цельную картину составить можно, но на вопрос — кто наша героиня — внятного ответа мы не получим. Некоторое объяснение неожиданно выпрыгивает на нас в одной из концовок. Новый персонаж, который до этого ни разу не упоминался! А ведь это буквально самый важный персонаж в сюжете! Спасибо хоть рассказали историю маленького фамильяра.  Местный лор понадёрган клочками из китайской мифологии и классических сказок. Тут даже есть меч в камне, который в сюжете никак не задействован. Герои просто обсудят его, и на этом всё.  Сложилось ощущение, что изначально делалась другая игра: все эти милые противники не очень-то вяжутся с сюжетом про конец света и вымершее человечество.  Бесплатное DLC про синеволосую фею, незнакомку из начала игры (почему-то с другим скином), вышедшее уже после релиза, призвано полнее раскрыть происходящее. А на деле лишь оголяет сюжетные дыры, показывая, что если бы феечка потратила минуту на общение с героиней, то та бы не гонялась за ней пол-игры с горящей попой. Но она своими туманно-агрессивными ответами создала видимость злого персонажа. Всё связанное с сюжетом можно описать словосочетанием "создать видимость".  Само DLC очень ленивое. Оно собрано из старых локаций, с которых убраны все предметы, а лишние проходы перекрыты красными стенами. От нас требуется пропрыгать персонажем 99-го уровня по пустой локации, и в финале повторно победить одного из боссов.  Ах, эти душные локации-лабиринты, которые начинаются с середины игры. Ещё позже они станут сверх всякой меры огромными. Шутка ли — на полное прохождение игры у меня ушло 50 часов! Такое ощущение, что после первых биомов фантазия авторам отказала, и они начали безбожно затягивать игру. Причём некоторые NPC, к которым придётся возвращаться снова и снова, специально расположены подальше от точки телепортации.  Каждый квест требует несколько раз отыскать определённых NPC на уже пройденных локациях. Сделать это можно через карту. Но мир игры огромен, а иконка NPC того же цвета, что и иконка дерева-сохранения.   При отдалении карта меняет вид и улетает от точки, на которую указывала на крупном плане. Но, по сравнению со всем остальным, это сущая мелочь.  Бесплатно можно перемещаться только между большими деревьями, коих на биоме одна штука. К маленьким деревьям можно переместиться только за платный флакон. Даже перемещение к большому дереву из любой точки карты будет стоить вам флакона! Благо, под конец можно этими флаконами брать и обмазываться. А пока можно использовать грязный хак: игра сохраняет прогресс при выходе, но загружается возле последнего дерева. Флакончики-то нашлись, а осадочек остался…  Иногда встречаются огромные комнаты-лабиринты с шипами. При получении урона от шипов героиню отбросит к самому входу. Причём наградой за прохождение таких комнат всегда, без исключения, будет бесполезный предмет с кучей минусов. Под конец игры это уже воспринимается как троллинг.  К управлению у меня две претензии. Серьёзная: прыжки по вертолётикам с зажатым вниз левым стиком. Этот же стик используется для управления полётом. Не до конца опустил стик вниз — рывок не сработал. Наклонил стик не по вертикали — летишь по диагонали. Подпрыгнул недостаточно высоко — пролетаешь вертолётик насквозь. Описал стиком четверть круга — выполняешь боевое умение. Единственная часть игры, вызывавшая фрустрацию. Напомню, что награда за мучения выглядит как издевательство.  Авторы будто бы сами это понимали, и позже выдали нам способность цепляться за стены. С ней вертолётики можно игнорировать везде, кроме комнат с шипами.  Вторая, мелкая претензия: неудобно реализовано взаимодействие с объектами — это нажатие стика вверх. Того же самого, на котором уже висят рывок вниз и управление персонажем. И когда на платформе, от которой следует оттолкнуться, расположена книжка, то героиня вместо прыжка начинает её читать. А выйти из монолога можно лишь прокликав тот до конца…  Практически все амулеты в игре — фикция. Что-то усиливают, но одновременно снижают  связанную характеристику. Например, амулет +5% к скорости атаки, -5% к урону. Как это отразится на уроне в секунду? Никак. Ещё круче: амулет +10% к шансу крита, -25% к урону от крита!  В игре много оружия, но большая часть бесполезна — слишком медленная. Всё оружие наносит одинаковый урон в секунду. Самый выгодный билд — парные клинки с амулетом на реген от ударов, т.к. они наносят больше более слабых ударов. С ними можно просто держать удар лицом — реген будет компенсировать все повреждения, и даже финальные боссы выносятся одной рукой.  Для ударов по летающим врагам ультимативным является кнут, т.к. позволяет зависать в воздухе, хлестая всех вокруг.  Магия показалась бесполезной, потому что её нельзя применять в прыжке. Что убивает весь её смысл, т.к. стрелять здесь можно только магией, а с земли достать летающих врагов невозможно. Приходится подпрыгивать, чтобы охлестать назойливого летуна по мордасам.  Умения оружия бесполезны. Использовать неудобно, а значительного увеличения урона они не дают. Проще просто затюкать противника обычной атакой. В этом сильно помогает настройка автоматического повторения нажатия кнопки атаки через сторонний софт.  Убогая механика прокачки оружия, когда к топовому клинку с уроном 160 последовательно добавляется +5, +3 и +2 ед. урона. Суммарно это +10 — ничто для финала игры.  Древо прокачки можно описать одним словом — "безыдейность". Любая прокачка всегда увеличивает показатель на 1-2, когда счёт идёт на сотни, или 0,5-2%. Само древо неудобное, и начиная с 40-х уровней его потребуется обходить повторно, докачивая уже прокачанные узлы.  Вернёмся к боевой системе. Рывок здесь не даёт кадров неуязвимости, а прикосновение к врагу наносит урон, из-за чего дэшить сквозь них больно. Ситуация исправляется с нахождением способности в самом конце игры, но надо было раньше. И всё равно в начале и в конце траектории героиня получит урон. Очередное затягивание игры, чтобы ты не пробегал исследованные локации, а прорубался через них.  Из-за этого также сложно уклониться от атаки. Если на открытой местности атаку можно перепрыгнуть, то в узком коридоре ни рывок сквозь противника, ни рывок назад скорее всего не позволят вам не получить урон. А игра полнится поганцами: прыгуны из-за края экрана, неуязвимые призраки-прилипалы, топающие вперёд два экрана громилы, мельтешащая под ногами мелюзга… Спасают кинжалы с регеном.  Ложка дёгтя в визуальном стиле: доп. костюмы — ленивая перекраска изначального в другой цвет. Причём читаемость персонажа на экране резко падает. Авторы так старались над дизайном и забили на такой мелочи. И все они тоже дают повышение статов на 1-2%.  [h3]А что в итоге?[/h3]  Не могу сказать, что это совсем уж плохая игра. Кроме комнат с шипами, ничто не вызвало желания забросить игру. А прекрасный арт поддерживал ощущение, что все точки над i будут расставлены. К сожалению, этого не произошло. И игра явно не заслуживает столь высокой оценки, какой её наградило сообщество.

Alright where do i start...  This is a good game. But it has some really flawed things that might put some people off from trying it.  Pros: - Its a mix of metroidvania with RPG, so you will get levels, equipments, talent points, etc... while doing some platforming (if you come from Hollow Knight or Silksong, its WAY easier, dont expect anything mindblowing). This is a pro for me since its a mix of 2 genres i like and has it fair well done. - Visually the game is good and has a decent OST. There's no masterpiece but all the themes fit well in the background. - The sense of progression is good. You can feel the impact of a new weapon, piece of gear or talent upgrade. - This is a point some people might disagree with me but... MAPS ARE HUGE... whatever you imagine, its bigger LOL. For comparison purposes... its way bigger than HK or Silksong. There's lots of corners to explore and backtrack after new powerups. You will feel lost but i dig it. - The map auto fills for you once you explore (no need a compass or sit on a bench... im looking at you Team cherry) which is a nice QoL. - The combat is satisfying. At the start its fairly basic but with time you unlock spells, combos and each weapon plays differently. If i have to nitpick something is that sometimes the game didnt felt responsive for a micro second leading to some lost inputs? Or maybe im just bad (it could very likely be this option). - There's a lot of bosses with different move sets. You can fight them all in the optional "pantheon" in the main menu. - It has voice acting which i consider good for this type of game. Dont expect JP levels of voice acting but they are still pleasant to listen (in english, which was the language i used).  Cons: - Story is a mess. It feels like its a mix of being overloaded with jargon at the very start with translation being weird sometimes. You can get the gist of it and understand the story eventually... but the start of the game feels weird (for a reason.. but could have been done better). - Some menu's are kinda... useless? The quest one in particular is never useful. You can find the NPC locations in the map with their icons BUT you need to manually search for them. Its annoying but not a dealbreaker (there's also google in case it gets too annoying). - Teleports cost items. So yes while you have perma dash since the start of the game basically... the devs must have decided to make the teleports cost 1 item in particular. You can buy more of these items (while finding quite a few through exploring) but money can be tight until lategame. Since the maps are huge... backtracking can be painful. - Bosses can be killed by spamming attacks and using heals, while avoiding their mechanics and ignoring their attacks... this is especially evident if you are like me and kill everything that moves in sight and become overleveled with good gear/weapons from exploration. THIS CANNOT BE SAID FROM THE PANTHEON BOSSES THO... - New Game + is not a New Game +.. its just 10 chapters of story with a boss battle sometimes. IT IS IMPORTANT HOWEVER FOR THE TRUE ENDING. Still id say this is a con because i expected an actual NG+.  Overall id say give this game a shot if you find it in promotion. For its normal price tag id say its a bit high. But if you manage to find it at 5€ like me... its a pretty sweet deal for that price. Overall i enjoyed the hell out of my 40+ hours of playing this game to 100% (without doing pantheon bosses) and i suggest you try it too. I was pleasantly surprised with how much i got addicted to this game, sometimes when i didnt even noticed the time pass by (definitely didnt went to bed at 4am once because i was having too much fun exploring and getting stronger).

절반도 진행 못한듯..  장점 1. 아트가 아름다움 2. 가격대비 볼륨이 큼 3. 수집요소나 보상 요소 잘 되어있음 4. 탐험 요소 충분함 5. 보스 전투가 쉬운편임  단점 1. 스토리도 그렇고 전체적으로 난잡함 2. 맵이 방대한데 정돈되어 있지 않음 3. 너무 불친절함 4. 전체적으로 몹들이 상당히 귀찮게 함 5. 몇군데에서는 아이템이 있어야 맵 이동이 되는게 불쾌함 6. 편의성이 안좋음  매트로배니아에 예쁜 아트가 취향이어 구매했지만 파면 팔수록 난항인 게임인것 같습니다. 예상한대로 아트는 예뻤지만 스토리가 정돈되어있지 않고   npc, 나를 계속 따라다니는 애도 그렇고 다들 말만 엄청 많고 뭘 하는 애인지도 모르겠어요. npc 서브퀘스트들도 이해가 복잡했구요.  최종적으로 내가 뭘 해야하는지 모르겠는 스토리가 큰 걸림돌입니다. 왜냐하면 메인 퀘스트와 서브퀘스트 마커가 따로 있지 않아서 도대체 어디로 가야하는지, 나는 무엇을 해야하는지, 목표가 무엇인지도 알수 없어서 몰입이 안되고 불친절 하다 느낍니다.  맵이 굉장히 방대하고 과하게 크다고 느끼는데 세이브 포인트가 아닌곳에서 이동시에는 이동 물약을 써서 이동해야하거나 뚜벅이로 가야하는 점도 마음에 들지 않았어요. npc들도 여기저기 흩어져있다보니 이동물약이나   체력물약 등을 파는 npc도 찾기 어려워 더욱 난잡하다 생각합니다.  어떤 섬으로 이동할때에는 갑자기 다른 방식으로 가오리 같은걸 타고 가야하고 그런것들까지 섞이니 맵이 전체적으로 난잡하다 느꼈고 많이 아쉬웠어요. 전체적으로 진행에 엄두가 안날정도로 과하다 느껴졌으나 아트는 예쁘다 생각합니다. 예쁜 아트만 보고 구매하시면 추천인데 어쨋든 저는 난잡한 구성과 스토리 등이 아쉬웠어요.

可能是我玩过有史以来最糟糕的类银河恶魔城游戏...... 地图做的又大又空，制作组希望把所有的路都做得像他们父母小时候描绘的上学路那样艰险，数不清的垃圾怪物和低能跳跳乐将地图变成了一个巨大的垃圾桶，并且往往这两者会打出完美的配合让你心态炸裂，甚至很多必经之路都会有跳跳乐。 首先说说怪物，这游戏的体量太大导致怪物很割裂，尤其是开局的红沙树林（？记不清名字了）左侧地图有70级怪物右侧地图是1级怪物，明知道自己的地图设计让主角非常后期才能来到该地图左侧，为什么不把小怪设计成血量会和主角的等级一起成长，并且由于地图太大整个游戏过程的绝大多数时间都是在收集路上清理这些垃圾小怪，纯正的折磨，并且所有的小兵除了幽灵小镇那几个幽灵都是有碰撞体积的。 其次就是跳跳乐，我真的不明白为什么这么大的地图要塞入如此密集的跳跳乐以至于我赶路都需要全神贯注，放入跳跳乐我也就不说了，跳跳乐碰刺回溯的范围是不是有点太刻意了，如同我在北京被车撞结果在广州复活了，而且捡到了收集品就不能让我直接碰刺回到入口吗，很多还要重复跳我真的心态崩溃； 还有就是收集品，整个地图就是让你收集一些毫无作用的垃圾，跳跳乐半天给你两个血瓶真的纯纯负反馈，捡到血瓶蓝瓶回城药水那一刻不被气笑的都是m，并且在收集物如此多的情况下也不出一个能力标记这些物品在哪，后期就给个能力标出来这里缺几个没收集有个🐦用还不是得看攻略玩，byd甚至口哨叫那个鱼给我进去赶路的地方也有东西要收集我真的气笑了； 再者就是那些任务和NPC，为什么在这种强绑定任务的游戏，任务引导做的几乎为零，每次跟NPC说一堆废话说完我就忘记内容了，任务下一步要我去什么地图找谁你给我标记好了呀，不看攻略我这辈子都不知道解石头是用在右上角陨石那里的； 最后就是地图，上述的所有要素堆在一起，就成为了心渊梦境这个巨大的粪坑，就这样他还能在地图上给你做一些小巧思，用一堆东西放在背景里把重要信息、物品挡住。 当我写完这段话时，我开始意识到我为了一个我一点也不喜欢的游戏浪费了太多时间，我真的劳累。。。
맵이 너무 지나치게 넓음 길 찾기 불편 미니맵 없음 던전 순간이동도 없음 스토리 딱히 몰입 안 됨 파트너 이 놈 뭐임?

Pretty meh. I really wanted this game to end like 10 hours before the ending itself. Absolutely not playing NG+ to unlock more endings.  This game is just way too long and locations are too big. The amount of times I got lost and had no idea where to go is too many to count. Visuals are great and that's about it. Combat/bosses are very easy since all you do is just spam attack button. No need to dodge since you have health potions, healing and then you can also get lifesteal down the road. Fast travel potion that you can buy also unlock way too late in the game.  Good luck playing this with no guides. I'd skip this and play any other game that has better movement, combat, talent tree. This game has none of that.

先说结论:制作组就踏马不会做类银，没有类银是这么做的。  这游戏有着较好的画面，并且颜色非常绚丽，多样的敌人，并且换皮怪非常少，庞大的地图，并且地图风景差异很明显，各式的装备，并且每样武器玩法都不一样。看似是一个非常好玩的游戏，但如果一个游戏的内核本身就是坏的，那么这些组合将构成一个巨大的折磨。   初开局是很经典且老套的出现主角，埋下主角身世谜题，然后出现boss战斗，初始并没有感觉有什么不对，并且接下来初探索会找到各式的武器，然后到达第一个小镇，之后你就会越来越恶心。 首先类银最大的乐趣是追随自身好奇心和能力解锁进行的探索，这游戏地图有大量的能力锁，但解锁能力位置和时间都没有指引并且靠后，导致你前期会有大部分时间经历千辛万苦到一个打不开的地方，然后重要的来了:没有传送点。是的，这游戏巨大的地图就塞了一两个传送点，并且经常三四条岔路，我最多时候十秒钟开了四次地图，然后第二个，传送需要道具，虽然可以无限买，但一个这么大地图并且毫无指引的游戏探索到一半还要就去买传送药这种割裂感，还有经常跑了快十分钟到地方发现奖励是一瓶传送药，或者红药蓝药，又或者是一个能力锁，感觉自己像个小丑到处跑。正反馈巨少，再加上那个本游戏唯一创新的跳跳乐机制:管你前面跳的多好，只要你挨一下就请回起点重新跳。诚然这游戏跳跳乐大部分不难，但这种饭里面放沙子的行为真的无比恶心！就像你写作文写了个错别字，不让改一定要重写，类银地图可以大，但这种又大又空又没有正反馈是玩着真的太难受了。 其二是战斗，虽然武器各种各样，但强弱是真的区别太大了，加上无比奇怪的碰撞判定，前期在没有能力的时候唯一的反制方法就是被打以后的无敌时间硬吃，开始我以为就是这样了，后来慢慢提升等级解锁技能以后战斗开始变得华丽，但本质上还是你打你的我打我的没什么交互，唯一的弹反也因为奇怪的碰撞判定导致时灵时不灵。不过搓招做的是真的挺灵敏的，有一段时间刀武器搓爽了。 任务设置也是毫无指引，前中期大部分时间就是无头苍蝇一样乱串，想探索地图就全是能力锁把你挡住，传动点又远，前期没钱还要考虑传送药的问题，到了中期解锁了能力以后探索的东西又没用了，由于武器等级机制大部分前期武器你没拿到就只有一个收集作用，加上所有任务零指引，玩的时候只有我是谁我应该去哪。看着茫茫大的地图不知所措。我是第一次玩类银玩出这种感觉，制作组不是不会做游戏，是不会做类银，不会做地图，讲个不好听的就是暗影火炬城的地图设计和指引都是吊打这游戏，感觉就是吃了一晚番茄酱炒混凝土配意大利面。  其余的什么人物画风割裂，配音捧读，剧情幼稚逻辑不顺结局动画敷衍这些就不提了。诚然中期有一段时间能力解锁我觉得有点意思了，甚至一度觉得可以给好评，但一个游戏的核心有问题，不管做的再光鲜亮丽也是没用的。这款游戏所有的可取之处，都是类银河城品类自带的基础乐趣，探索的未知感，还有操作弹反带来的爽快感。而制作组自己原创、自研的设计，全是不成熟、不合理、折磨玩家的内容。

On the surface, this game isn't bad, and that's honestly what makes it all the more frustrating. If it was straight up terrible I could just laugh, uninstall it, and move on. Instead it sits in this weird space where everything is technically competent, but somehow the entire thing feels empty.   [b]The whole thing felt like AI slop before we had AI slop.[/b] It came out in 2023 so that's probably not what's happening, but something fishy is going on here. I can smell it.  The issue is that the portrait art is in 3 different art styles. Art styles that one artist would NOT COMBINE. [i](painterly, anime, and vector)[/i] What this tells me is that the artists had zero communication with each other which... feels like a red flag to me. Why did the people who worked on this game not have a single conversation? It's just weird. It made me feel uncomfortable the whole game. Did this game come from a sweatshop with poor pay and bad working conditions? Is that why no one communicated? It makes me ask so many questions.  I can't tell if the lead developer just has zero artistic bones his their body, and was actually oblivious to all of this, or if there is actually something nefarious goin on here.   Either way this game felt more like a checklist of what makes a metroidvania, rather than a game that resulted in a love and passion for the genre. There were a few easter eggs, [spoiler]like a Hollow Knight mask,[/spoiler] that you can find... So maybe there was love... but it still ended up feeling souless to me.  I kept waiting for the game to make me care about literally anything. The world never pulled me in. The story never grabbed me... It didn't even make sense at times. This could be a Chinese to English localization issue, but the version I played, it barely made any sense. Also....? Sooooo many typos.... so either way... If you are playing this in English just be aware of that. [i](Also, I got all 10 endings trying to make sense of this game. I really did try.)[/i]  The pacing also felt weird. I'd unlock something, discover a new area, find a boss, and instead of feeling excited and like progress had been made, I just felt like I was checking boxes. "Okay, here's the next area. Okay, here's the next ability. Okay, here's another character saying mysterious stuff." I was progressing, but I wasn't invested in the progress at all. The game gave me no reason to be. I was bored the whole way through.  I would give this game a mixed review if allowed, but negative it is as I really cannot reccommend anyone play this. Maybe if you have already exhausted all other metroidvania options....   Or I guess if you suck at metroidvanias, because that was another issue with this game. 99% of the bosses I beat by standing still and mashing attack and just tanking damage. Literally zero challenge to this game. There was no reason to even try.

God, I love this game so much. Afterimage very quickly became one of my favorite games of all time, so I wanted to write a review for this gem. I’ll talk about the aspects that stood out to me the most, which is the graphics, gameplay, music, and story.   [h2]Graphics[/h2] Right away, the game wows you with breathtakingly beautiful vistas. All the backgrounds, terrain tilesets, and even the main character animation sprites are hand painted. From ethereal sceneries to haunting locations, the game’s strong art style gave each of the different locations distinct feel while still being mesmerizingly pretty. It’s definitely one of, if not the most beautiful 2D game I’ve played.  [h2]Gameplay[/h2] The ability to dash cancel attacks makes the combat quick and fluid right from the beginning. I love how the first attack in the air delays your fall, both allowing for interesting aerial combat options and serving as movement tech. As the game progresses, more abilities are unlocked, most of which increases your options in both combat and movement, making fighting and traversing the map even smoother and more fun. There are 6 weapon classes to choose from, each with unique strengths and weaknesses and weapon skills. I really enjoyed experimenting with all the different weapon abilities and character abilities to see what cool stuff I can pull off.  [h2]Music[/h2] The team did a phenomenal job with the game’s sound track. The music is memorable, ranging from relaxing exploration music, to epic cinematic scores, to blood pumping battle music. I find myself constantly taking a pause to appreciate the background music. I even bought the digital soundtrack on Steam.  [h2]Story[/h2] This part seems to be divisive. Personally, I have no idea what people mean when they say the story is difficult to understand, or that the story is too long. I thought the story was clear enough. The game delivers its story in a clear, and easily understandable way, without overstaying its welcome. Dialogues are short, concise, but still feel in character, in universe, like two people talking instead of just info dumping. I also absolutely love the story, the lore, the world building. It’s so unique, completely unlike anything I’ve seen before.  Overall, I had a phenomenal time with the game. Afterimage is so beautiful, so ambitious, and so enjoyable. 100%-ing the game clocked my playtime at around 66 hours, which might be long for some, but I’m used to games with those numbers for playtime, and loved every second of it. Afterimage is such a special game for me and will always hold a place in my heart.

This isn't a perfect game--the plot is a mess, the game does not explain much of anything, it's easy to not know where to go next in the early/mid game, and the little anime girl is creepy AF (not in horror way)--but the actual gameplay is excellent and fun. The character controls well, moves fluidly, and any quirks are minor and inconsequential. The map is huge and each region distinct and interesting. There's a nice variety of weapons, skills, and abilities that can presumably accommodate a variety of play styles. Platforming is generally enjoyable and occasionally challenging (without being punishing or frustrating). Combat, like the platforming, was smooth, fun, sometimes a challenge (without being frustrating), and a good pace. It's a solidly good player-friendly metroidvania.

Afterimage is one of those games that I can completely understand why some people love... while also feeling absolutely nothing compelling enough to keep going myself.  I dropped it after a few hours, and honestly, by then I felt like I had already seen what the game had to offer.  The first impression was already shaky. While it does have its own visual identity, it never really delivers that “okay, now I get it” moment. Instead, it’s a very slow burn that never actually ignited for me.  The strongest part of the game is easily its presentation. The hand-drawn art style is genuinely beautiful, with clear Ender Magnolia / Ender Lilies DNA in the character design, even if the world itself goes in a different direction. Enemy variety is also surprisingly strong: different creatures, movesets, sounds, and biome-specific designs help the world feel visually alive. Sound effects are solid, and full voice acting is a nice touch.  But once you actually start playing, things begin to fall apart.  Movement never clicked for me. Even after unlocking a few abilities, traversal always felt... off. Hard to describe precisely, but the character movement lacks that tight, satisfying responsiveness.  Combat doesn’t help much either. There’s a lot of weapon variety: swords, dual blades, heavier weapons, whips, each with different stats and movesets, which sounds great on paper. But actual encounters never demand much from you. Enemies look varied, but rarely threatening. Bosses are especially disappointing: none of the ones I fought felt memorable, dangerous, or mechanically interesting. Most fights boiled down to mashing attack, (eventually) healing, and moving on.  And then there’s the story. Or whatever was happening there. Four hours in, I still had no clue what was going on, and by the end I was just smashing X through dialogue because I had completely checked out.  This is not a bad game. That’s important. It’s not broken. It’s not incompetent. It just didn’t click for me. There are simply too many better options competing for your time. And honestly, that was the deciding factor. This wasn’t a rage quit. This was a “I respect what you’re doing, but I have dozens of (allegedly) better games waiting in my backlog” quit.  TL;DR; Beautiful art, decent production values, weak movement feel, forgettable combat, confusing story, and almost no challenge. 6/10

An average game. The low difficulty level hides lame mechanics that ruin the entire game.  Positives: The amount of content – ​​there are so many regions that this game easily lasts for about 50 hours of leisurely play, making it the longest Metroidvania I've ever played.  Character and Equipment Development: Progression is fun – killing earns you skills, which you spend on abilities, and there are a lot of different weapons – you can choose one that's fun to play with and upgrade it to the max.  Difficulty Level: The game is so easy (and that's a good thing; every metroidvania should be easy) that most bosses can be defeated simply by standing and beating them up, as you heal faster than the boss kills you. This is how 80% of bosses are if you take character development seriously and max out at every possible moment. One boss gave me trouble (I had to try it five times), and the final boss, Red Renee, is absolutely overdone. This boss is so difficult that it shouldn't even be in this game, as it doesn't fit the overall difficulty level. Besides the simple combat, there's also fairly straightforward platforming, with a few more challenging sections. I couldn't get through one of them (double jumps and POGO), so to even get out, I had to teleport to the save tree.  Meh: Combat - the combat would be okay (the combat itself is okay), if it weren't for two things, which I'll discuss below:  Exploration - as above, there are a lot of items to collect, but exploration is ruined by one thing.  Negatives:  Contact damage - a stupidity that shouldn't exist in games. If the purpose of your existence is to touch the player, you shouldn't exist.  Teleport system - you can teleport between large trees (one per location) and, using an item you buy, teleport to smaller trees, and this stupid system makes backtracking and exploration weak.  Character movement - the heroine's movement is horrible until you get wall jumping which saves jumping. double jump s too low, the character jumps without grabbing the edge. In fact, you have to jump higher to even get the jump, so the angle is lower than it should be.  Dash - the initial dash doesn't have iFrames, and you're dodging backwards from attacks, not through the opponent. An idiot invented a dash without iFrames.  In summary - 5/10, average rating (if it finally comes to Steam), for now it gets a positive rating.

[h2]You will WANDER[/h2] It's a wandering game. You will wander around A LOT without knowing where to go.  To some people (most metroidvania fans) that's a massive positive. To others, having a tangible lack of direction can be a slight negative. Doesn't mean the game has to hold your hand the whole time either. Think Metroid Prime (or even Super Metroid); it told you the general vicinity to search, but never told you HOW to get there. Or Dark Souls, with its cryptic NPC guidance. Or even Silksong, with its "hey, that area may be a bit sussy, yeah?" queues.  Afterimage is a game where you [i]will[/i] get lost, and frequently. You'll know where you'll eventually be able to go (thanks to obvious ability-gated structures) but finding the thing you need will be a journey and a half.  With it being pretty open ended, it low-key reminds me a bit of Elden Ring, in how you were basically running around the map trying to figure out where you were supposed to be. Open world games, with a bit [i]too[/i] much to explore, hasn't really been my thing, and I'm finding it's not really my thing here either.  HOWEVER, it's still fun, and I'm still playing it (and currently lost again). So, even with it being not my particularly favorite genre, it's still a positive experience so far.  Skills are cool. Levels are cool, characters are cool, dialog is cool, exploration is rewarding. The maps are [b]HUGE[/b]. I think the whole thing may be larger than Hollow Knight's map.   But anyhoo, if this sounds like your thing, grab it!

Игру можно разложить на три составляющих, две из которых мне не нравятся, я считаю, сделаны они слабо. 1. Сюжет и подсюжеты 2. Геймплей 3. Визуал.  И вот к визуалу (3) особых претензий нет. Возможно, если вы не большой поклонник аниме-стилистики, вам не зайдёт, но в среднем всё красиво нарисовано, на фоне порой виды просто бомбические. Единственное, что — это только лишь виды, не более.  2. В геймплее отсутствует какой-либо комплексный подход. Есть набор разного вооружения, в том числе заклинания, но у всего этого нет сколько-нибудь скилл-ориентированного подхода. То есть подход к каждому противнику один — бей, оно умрёт. Может, со второго или третьего удара, но умрёт. Какой-то стратегии тут нет, да и «боль» от потери очков жизни здесь несущественная.   Боссы в массе своей демонстрируют ту же схему. В лучшем случае нужно подходить со стратегией «бей-уворачивайся». Лишь где-то у трёх боссов мне приходилось действительно учить паттерн атак и вырабатывать подход.  Короче,  геймплей скучный. И тут разумеется, есть ещё платформинг, где надо взбираться куда-то... Но он тоже довольно скучный, тут не надо ни думать, ни смотреть, просто знай себе прыгай. Есть ещё немало секретов, но находить некоторые из них придётся исключительно тыкаясь в стены, как в старом добром Doom.   И про сюжет (1). Тут есть история, но она рассказана максимально незахватывающе. Большую часть истории мы вместе с героиней вообще недоумеваем, кто мы и что мы тут делаем. И даже когда понимание появляется, нельзя сказать, чтобы вместе с ней появлялась мотивация. В итоге история не трогает. Так что даже описывать как-то не хочется. Мы странная девушка-магичка с амнезией и говорящим фамильяром, скитаемся по миру, пережившему магический апокалипсис. Если утрировать это всё.   Но есть ещё «квесты». Квестами их называет игра, потому что в девяти случаях из десяти игра никак не обозначает задачу или цель. В журнале значится что-то вроде «Мы встретили Николь. Она искала свою госпожу наставницу». И в итоге, конечно, становится понятно, что игра просто хочет, чтобы мы несколько раз находили Николь на карте, а её сюжет будет каким-то образом происходить где-то там, за кадром. Но это же скучно и обидно даже. Весь смысл игры в том, чтобы взаимодействовать с миром, участвовать в его судьбе. А тут мы ни на что не влияем, все эти «квесты» делают себя сами.   В общем, скучно. При этом нельзя сказать, что это неиграбельно. Я её прошёл, поигрывая по вечерам по полчаса-часу за раз, она отвлекала меня от реальности. Но по итогу осталось ощущение опустошения и разочарования. В общем, не рекомендую.

时隔三年终于在亲友的提醒下想起上海烛龙还有一款游戏我没品鉴了，速速用四天打得七七八八。 美术方面：总体来看还是很不错的，每张地图就有自己的特色，虽然蕾妮的画风感觉和别的npc感觉不是一个游戏的，有点出戏。最喜欢的是水之脉络到月之墓那块，有种看到龙宫的震撼感，其次是天空城那块，古古的很喜欢，希望古四能有类似的场景吧。 剧情方面：总体还是比较流畅的，在看完42线之后能把剧情基本上都梳理完，简单来说就是一个野心过剩的人族同龄妄图登神引发的种种效应，一些小支线还蛮有趣的，就是到处跑显得我很苦命。没有什么高深的话语，伊芙的插科打诨也很萌，蕾妮42都是好女孩，卡萨也太能跑了，以及妮可宝宝来和我贴贴不管那个卡琳我当你老师好吗。 关卡设计方面：确实很能堆料，地图比较空所以塞了很多乱七八糟的搜集物，而且道路的指引有些真的太阴间了，我都不记得自己有多少次因为找不到打开捷径/宝箱的路破防去看攻略了，每天睡前打一会然后上床打开攻略视频，一肚子气地第二天一起床就打开游戏开始开路，哇真的打得我好生气。不过地图很大这方面很满足我的探索欲望，后期基本上能力比较齐全了自己探图就很好玩，每天都在看新图喜欢喜欢。 战斗方面我就不多说了，因为我已经无数次在跳跳乐的时候破防了选择了使用世界之外的力量，因为这里没有莲中境给我炼药我的神农大法无力施展，在跳跳乐对我说这是个不死不休的境地的时候我已然发现其实我爱的不是上海烛龙而是风xxx和x幸姐。双刀的升龙很帅，剑的满月也很好看，还有全游唯一指定毕业武器无名，啥时候整把无争给我使唤使唤，其他的武器没怎么用就不说了。 综上来看是一款量大管饱的游戏，但是地图设计上还是略显稚嫩了，考虑到这本来就是练手之作，没有了后续的dlc还是有点可惜的，做完古四能不能给我补全一下沸腾水脉的故事（低声），算了你们还是先把吉时已到做好吧，就这么下墓！说到这里才想起其实巨人的陨落也是在下墓呢^^

已全成就，感觉是部优秀的类银。目前国产类银只玩过边境猎人和心渊梦境，感觉心渊梦境明显更好一些。 美术优秀不用多说，相信大家也都看得出来；武器系统在我玩过的类银里算是做的比较好的，每种武器各有特点、手感也好、也都有相应的简单操作方式，没错，最重要的是简单！本人很懒，有的游戏搓招出了很多种，但是因为麻烦根本没兴趣学搓招，结果往往一种武器平砍到底。。。BOSS难度不高，只要愿意嗑药、吃菜、练级，没有BOSS是莽不过去的；跳跳乐不多、难度也不高，就算实在跳不过去可以等有三段跳和高跳以后再试；大家吐槽的地图单向门、藏宝其实也是类银游戏经典设计了，相信喜欢类银的玩家基本都会喜欢这款游戏的。 缺点也有，第一点就是大家诟病的地图大，其实本来也还好，但是做全成就的时候需要武器、饰品、金币、花叶全收集，那个寻宝后像又并不好用，导致寻宝查漏非常麻烦（磨练心性.jpg）；第二点是剧情，虽然剧情不是类银的重点，不过这游戏里剧情确实不太有存在感；第三点是各类武器强度不均，不过这也是小问题；然后是个人的曲曲~打完最终BOSS咋不给个贼好用的毕业套装嘞（比如泰拉天顶剑）（ 结果最后用的还是小有负面效果的套装），这是我通关应得的奖励！！！

Nunca fui muito fã de jogos metroidvania, mas Afterimage me fisgou ao ponto de eu querer fazer 100%. Por mais que a história seja fraca e sem peso, eu ainda gostei demais da gameplay e de como o jogo fica fluido quando você pega todas as habilidades. A arte do jogo é absurdamente linda, com muitos biomas diferentes, o que me fez tirar mais de 100 prints nessa bagaça.  Pena que a arte dos personagens tem uma qualidade muito baixa e, durante os diálogos, a imagem deles nunca muda, deixando as conversas monótonas e sem graça. Os finais eu também achei bem fracos. Se eu não me engano, são 9 finais, e o mais legal (q eu mais gostei) é um final que é um easter egg de Matrix.  Mas, tirando isso, o jogo tem uma gama muito alta de armas e jeitos de lutar, tudo muito satisfatório e prazeroso de jogar. As boss fights também são boas e equilibradas. Acho que eu daria nota 9/10 pra gameplay, 8/10 pro visual e 5/10 pra história

[h3] 评测者已获得全成就 [/h3]  [h2] 只推荐类银河战士恶魔城爱好者购买并游玩。 [/h2]  [h3] 优点： [/h3] 地图数量多、面积大，游戏流程长（35h以上）。 美术氛围独特（据主创说，刻意采用了明亮的美术风格，这种尝试值得肯定）。 世界观宏大（包含3个大方向的10种结局）。  [h3] 缺点： [/h3] 地图缺乏设计感，为大而大，许多可破坏单向障碍摆在大道上，体验比较糟糕。 环境画风略显廉价，玩家角色和NPC的形象设计比较突兀。 人物动作僵硬，冲刺手感差，在跑图过程中缺乏灵活的纵向机动能力（后期获得的大冲不计）。 收集品缺乏层次，大部分收集品毫无意义，全收集过程极其浪费时间、异常痛苦。 主创不鼓励玩家使用传送功能（大存档点之间距离远、传送道具较为昂贵），跟踪支线困难。 值得特别说明的缺点：因为地图太大太复杂，地图标记功能使用体验不佳，跑图过程中需要频繁打开地图。 战斗系统简陋，武器战技实用性不高。 特别提及：玩家角色在受击后有一定概率无法攻击，持续时间不等，解除条件不明，严重影响游戏体验。我没有看到其他玩家针对这种现象发布的报告，不清楚其是否是bug，但这绝对是严重漏洞，非常败手感。  [h3] 一些争议： [/h3] 1、跳跳乐——《心渊梦境》的跳跳乐设计平庸，但绝非充满恶意，其难度在类银游戏里中等偏下。真正的问题在于部分跳跳乐的奖励和流程不匹配，跳过去也毫无意义。 2、引导——对类银游戏来说，缺乏引导应该叫弱引导，更何况《心渊梦境》还有一些有利于你探索的小设计，比如标注出等级差距过高的敌人。反正图都那么大了，慢慢探索吧，不用急着通关。 3、游戏难度——据说“普通难度”是在游戏发行后特意划分出来的，为了照顾没有类似游戏经验的玩家，但这个难度有点破坏玩家体验了，或者说让玩家毫无体验。一定要选进阶。 4、实际剧情——即便在碎片化叙事中也算是很差的那一档，建议整体略过无关主线的剧情。  野心很大，质量一般。不过，大致推荐，降价可买。

一款融合了多种元素的国产类银，难度不算很高，但是探索比较需要攻略。 游戏里boss倒是不难打。地图量非常大，不过存档点之间可以直接传送。大跳在很多地方都挺超模的。而且有多种武器的连招选择。  缺点也有一些。 最大的问题是缺少引导，不看攻略的话很难知道探图顺序，然后结局之前也不给引导提示。 然后就是东西太能藏了，自带的指南针只能看个特别模糊的大概，有些攻略博主都需要补漏。 还有跳跳乐，即使简单难度不扣血，有些跳跳乐还是很麻烦，因为中间不给检查点，直接传送回起点且很可能还是在半空，比如白塔和天空殿的有几个，以及引水渠的那个。 游戏比较缺钱，要打全成就尤其缺钱，却没有比较好的刷钱的地方。 还有就是装备总是要有debuff，有好属性的装备总要在其它地方给你扣点属性。 另外剧情还有一点莫名其妙。  对了，游戏的下踢设计是跳跃键+下方向键，在键盘上操作非常奇怪，会更加的复杂。下踢时如果按到了左或右方向键，就会变成斜向踢，就可能会踢偏，在半空下踢偏了就会直接落到下面去，所以下踢前可能需要松开左或右方向键。而由于下踢占用了方向键，所以二段跳的时候就需要松开下方向键。 所以如果要下踢着往右走，就需要在下踢前松开右方向键，再按跳跃键+下方向键，下踢后要松开下方向键，按右方向键前进，需要多好几个操作。
とにかくマップが広い 探索が楽しいと思うか怠いと思うかで評価が分かれそう ファストトラベルが不便なのとマップの広さに対して移動速度も物足りないのも怠く感じるかも その分ショートカット解放された時は嬉しい  ストーリーは意味不明でした

아트는 이쁜데 스토리에 몰입이 전혀 안됨. 플레이하는 입장에서 그래서 어쩌라고? 식이 되어버림 맵은 넓고 복잡하며 일직선 방향이 아닌 유기적으로 연결되어 있는것 같기는 한데, 앉아서 기어가면 될것 같은 곳을 강제로 막아놓는다던가, 점프가 아슬아슬하게 안닿는 등 초반에 일부로 막아놓은 곳이 너무 자주 눈에 띄임.  가장 큰 문제는 게임을 한다 그 자체 외에 목적성을 모르겠다는건데, 스토리의 경우 그래서 뭘 해야하는건데? 식이 되어버리고 메트로바니아로서도 이질감이 느껴지는게, 원래 a지역에서 막히면 b나 c지역에서 능력을 얻고 a 지역 막힌 곳을 뚫고 다시 b지역 막힌 곳을 뚫는 식으로 진행이 스무스하게 되야하는 법인데 스토리 진행을 위한 목적지가 어디인지는 모르겠고, 막힌 곳은 언제 갈 수 있는건지도 모르겠고, 내가 뭘 해야하는지 모험을 하면서도 감이 안잡힌다는 점. 성장의 경우 스킬포인트를 찍어서 올리는 식으로 되어 있는데 수치는 약하고 플레이에 변화는 없다보니 처음할 때나 1시간 후에나 내가 여정을 통해 강해졌다 뭔가 쎄진듯한 느낌이 없음.  그냥 길 가다가 몬스터 만나면 일단 때리고 보는거고 길 가다가 막히면 아직 못가는갑다 하며 내가 현재 갈 수 있는 길이나 찾아보는게 끝인듯

Сколько бы не играл в Afterimage, она всё не кончается, появляются всё новые и новые приятные локации, которые каждый раз приносят новое удовольствие и впечатление. Мне всё ещё не надоело и не надоест геймплей. Атмосферная музыка, приятная боёвка, красочные локации, плавные анимации, незатейливое повествование, приятные фоны, с удовольствием трачу на эту игру от получаса до нескольких часов после работы или на выходных. Конечно в игре есть уйма топорных или нелогичных, но для уменьшения положительных впечатлений и своей высокой оценки я повода не вижу, не смотря ни на что, я можно сказать люблю эту игру, тем более что цена совсем невысокая, не чувствую что переплатил. Великолепно проработанный представитель жанра метроидвания. Первый пяток локаций очень лёгкие, и служат скорее окунуться в атмосферу, но уже потом начнутся некоторые проблемы если играть на втором уровне сложности, и уже ближе к середине игры залпом проходить никак не получится как было в начале.  Но как по мне баланс вполне приемлемый. Крайне рекомендую хотя бы попробовать. Поиграв некоторые время в версию с рутрекера, для себя я высоко оценил игру и купил её напрямую в стим. И даже сыграв столько часов, впереди ещё тонна контента, буду и дальше рад заходить в эту сказку. Такое сильное удовольствие от игр я последний раз испытывал лишь несколько лет назад. Дополнительно могу порекомендовать игру Foregone в этом же жанре.

Great game.  I think it does all the important parts of a metroidvania very well.  Movement and platforming is quick and responsive making it fun to track and backtrack through the map.  Big thing is air attacks are floaty so you can do a lot of cheesy feeling jumps.  Might take a bit longer than expected to get some movement upgrades.  Art is pretty with varied environments so you won't get visually bored.  Character is very responsive with animation cancelling with jumps, landing, and crouching.  Multiple weapon types to keep it varied with multiple special moves for each.  Map is often very open which is hard for the intended path enjoyer in me but a huge plus to others.  Few if any quest markers so it's definitely more of a figured it out quest philosophy (or google).  Story is there.  Things are happening that I'm kind of following.  I feel like a lot of times I find an NPC and multiple story trigger happen because I already did the thing they were going to tell me to do.  There's plenty of in game text about the lore though.

Concrètement le jeu n'a rien pour lui mise appart la taille de sa map, les combats sont pas intéressant voir juste relou, les armes "diverses" ( c'est 7 armes différentes avec un reskin et des stats différentes rien de plus ), l'histoire est juste nul, l'exploration brouillon + le système de voyage rapide est mal fait surtout pour une map aussi grande et les graphismes sont beau mais sans aucune identité c'est fade quoi. Aussi ne pensais pas que j'abuse quand je fait mon avis, je me disais la même chose en lisant les avis négatifs, bref je terminerai peut être un jour le jeu si je m'ennuie mais rien d'autre...

My favorite Metroidvania to this day.  Aside from the gorgeous visuals, Afterimage's main selling point it that it's *huge*, the biggest map of any Metroidvania I know of. Because of that, how much you enjoy the game is going to depend a lot on how much you enjoy exploration, since you'll be spending a lot of time on it. Combat is solid, and having access to 6 weapon categories with their own movesets helps keep things fresh. The storytelling is needlessly cryptic but also doesn't get in the way too much, and it at least clears some things up at the very end. It's not a game for everyone, but it's fantastic if your tastes align with the game's priorities.

Pretty but shallow metroidvania  It's rare that I don't see a game through but Afterimage hasn't offered anything exciting at all in the 8 hours I've played so far.  The hand-drawn art and music are lovely but everything else from the abilities, combat, exploration and movement are half-baked. Movement especially is slow, frustrating and loose. Enemies and bosses have been nothing but a hack-and-slash cheese fest--there's little pattern, design or challenge, it's just button mashing.  World exploration is deceptively linear, with little challenge to platforming or secrets. I just can't be bothered doing any more.  The Japanese VA's are excellent, and the story seems interesting. Shame about the rest.

Afterimage - це дуже гарна і доверху набита контентом метроїдванія. Гра зібрала, напевно, все, що має мати представник жанру - різномаїті регіони, секретки, безліч босів, і пропонує все це у вигляді якісної суміші платформінгу та боївки. Покращувати і вдосконалювати свою Renee одне задоволення. Знаходити для неї нові вміння, шукати оптимальну зброю під власний стиль гри, заглиблюватись в прокачку та комбо-прийоми стане розвагою не на один десяток годин. До того ж, досліджувати й світ Engardin не менш цікаво, а прекрасні задники чудово доповнюють лабіринти левел-дизайну.  Єдине чого не вистачає - це кращої роботи з сюжетом. Подача кульгає та залишає враження ніби занурення гравця в основні події загалом на меті не стояло. Максимум, що можна побачити - це функціональний набір тропів, покликаний провести гідом по локаціям і показати на мапі загальний напрямок наступного пункту призначення. Цікаві ідеї місцевої міфології змушують бажати бачити їх глибшого розвитку.

Well, first of all, a big respect for the handrawn visuals, and voice acting. Thats about all this game has. It would be better if you guys didn`t combine Ori (litteraly your save Trees look EXACLY like from Ori) and Hollow Knight`s controls (litterally the same controls). The visuals you stole from Ori are incomplete, and the controls you stole from HK are laughable. HK is a fully precise, megasensitive controls that seem to read your mind, and controls in Afterimage are janky as hell, and not sensitive at all. The story is straight out of a children`s book, and not in a good way. Combat feels so bad, and completely unchallanging, platforming sometimes works, sometimes doesn`t. Like I have to make a double jump on a platform, and first 2 times it doesn`t reach the height, and than the 3rd time it reaches, with a completely same double jump (I do not mean a difficult jump with traps that require skill, I mean a jump straight up onto a wall). No original idea, no inovation in the game, purely stolen ideas, that are 10 times more janky and do not feel right like in the games you stole from. I am sorry for this kind of a review, but I have to say it in hopes that, if you keep your studio open in the future, please try much harder, and do not release a game until it feels like a good game. If it weren`t for somewhat lovely visuals I would rate it 2/10. But, since you tried with the drawing, I am gonna give it a 3.5/10.

Big, Beautiful, and Bad at Explaining Itself Rating: 9/10  I loved this game. Genuinely. It's in my top 5 Metroidvanias.  The world is incredible. Massive biomes that go on forever, shortcuts that loop back in surprising ways, and exploration that actually feels rewarding. Mixed with light RPG mechanics (leveling, talent trees, gear), it hits a real sweet spot.  The lore is fascinating. The story itself is hard to follow—something about a world tree and a cycle of rebirth—but the worldbuilding and atmosphere carry it. There's a real melancholy to exploring these abandoned ruins and piecing together what happened.  But the game sucks at explaining itself.  I went a good 70% of the way through before I realized food gives you permanent stat buffs. Also talent points are how you actually level up—not just gaining levels. The game never tells you any of this.  Also, locking fast travel behind a consumable is insane. You can buy them cheap later, but early on it's rough.  Getting lost is real. The map is so huge that I spent an ungodly amount of time wandering around, hitting dead ends, and getting frustrated. But honestly, that's also what made the exploration feel so good when things finally clicked.   If you like big, cryptic Metroidvanias that don't hold your hand (sometimes to a fault), play this. I whole heartedly recommend it.

Au début j'ai trouvé ce jeu mauvais et j’ai voulu arrêter d'y jouer. Maintenant je le trouve excellent.  Je pense que la raison c'est que c'est un monde ouvert déguisé en metroidvania. Donc perso j'ai commencé à y jouer comme j'y jouerais si c’était un metroidvania, c'est à dire comme un completioniste. C'est à dire que j'ai méthodiquement exploré chaque zone en notant sur la carte les endroits où je ne pouvais pas accéder pour plus tard. En faisant cela, je tournais en rond dans chaque zone pendant 50 ans à refaire en boucle les mêmes choses et je trouvais tellement d’arme et d’upgrade de puissance que je roulais sur les boss et que j’avais un inventaire remplis ide connerie que je n’utilisais jamais. Et en plus je me sentais perdu dans toutes cette imensité. Bref j’avais l’impression que ce jeu faisait dans la quantité au détriment de la qualité Puis je me suis mis à jouer à ce jeu en mode rôle-play et tout de suite c’est devenu beaucoup plus amusant. Mon personnage il doit atteindre une destination lointaine, le plus vite possible et sans avoir de carte. Il est pas là pour faire du tourisme et a aucun moment je ne vais tomber sur une barrière qui va exiger que j’aie la carte bleue ou le pouvoir de double-saut pour avancer(en tout cas dans le chemin principal). Donc il va avancer en ligne droite au hasard dans ses décors magnifiques en tentant de trouver son chemin. En fait il serait plus juste de dire que c’est un metrodivania qui se joue comme un jeu de plateforme 2D. Les upgrades ne sont pas des bonus qu’il faut tous collecter mais des lots de consolation lorsque l’on s’est trompé de chemin. On ne doit les chercher que si on est confronté à un boss trop dur. L’immensité du monde n’est pas là pour être exploré de fond en comble mais pour que l’on puisse s’y perdre. Pour qu’on est l’impression de parcourir un monde crédible qui existe vraiment et non un niveau de jeux vidéo. Ça donne une vraie sensation d’exploration que j’adore. Et lorsque l’on parvient à trouver rapidement le bon chemin grâce à son sens de l’orientation ça donne une sensation de satisfaction très agréable. C’est différent de d’habitude et j‘aime bien.  Par contre je me serais bien passé de toute la partie RPG du titre qui demande de passer du temps chiant dans les menus. Ou plutôt je trouve quelle est beaucoup trop riche et que ça donne des menus bien trop nombreux. À chaque fois que je veux quitter le jeu je passe au mois une minute a trouvé le menu option pour quitter tellement il y a  de truc. Et je trouve que toute cette richesse ça apporte pas grand-chose au titre. Mais ça c’est un goût personnelle. D’autre trouveront sans doute amusant de pouvoir personnaliser autant le build de leur personnage. Je précise que j''écris ce commentaire en ayant pas finit le jeu. je changerait peut être d'avis dans 10 heures.

This game is terribly generic and mediocre; it feels like a game with no identity or soul.  At first glance it may look appealing. But as soon as the player begins exploring, the question “Why do I even want to explore this world?” quickly surfaces. The level design is superficial at best, yet the world itself is unnecessarily huge. What's worse, there’s no direction, no meaningful points of interest to guide the exploration, so traversing the map becomes nothing more than a slog.  The same issue extends to items, equipment, and enemy design. It feels that there's no distinction between them; they all feel very repetitive, as if the same ideas are being thrown at the player over and over. As for the narrative, it seems like the game does not even try to tell a proper story—a story that is never interesting to begin with.  A metroidvania should have good pacing, at least a carefully designed pacing. Strong pacing keeps players hooked by consistently introducing fresh experiences; which this game does not have. When the same things are repeated constantly, it really can destroy the flow, and instead only highlights how boring the game is (maybe also how untalented the dev is).  Big does not always equal beautiful—if anything that’s a lesson this game teaches. When a dev can’t execute everything well, it’s better to scale back and let go of some. As the Chinese saying says: when you bite off too much, you end up unable to chew.

Do note that this review is subject to change as I do more endings;  So, the biggest problem for a normal person is the lack of direction. Early on it gives you the vague objective of reach the Misty Waters, but how you get there is up to you. As a fan of Metroid, I don't have a problem with this, as I usually enjoy the puzzle of finding out the right paths.  HOWEVER, Metroid usually does its best to not have plot triggers that you can just stumble into out of order... this game doesn't. That's MY biggest issue; you can, if you just free roam explore, stumble into plot triggers and get stuff out of order.   For example, I was supposed to reach a point in the Ashen Canyon from its right for a plot trigger, instead I came in from its left. As I jumped into the canyon, the game freaked out and jumped to where I was supposed to be, then went back to my character and the moment she landed, a cutscene happened where they talk about the canyon and not to fall in, as if I was where the camera jumped to.  I've also had random other plot coupons fall into my lap by just looking around and then suddenly I break sequence because I clearly had something I wasn't meant to have at that moment. It's super jank and it feels like I did something wrong, even though the game didn't bother to lock things sufficiently, or have a flag set for things to not appear until needed.  The second biggest issue is the plot. Now, granted, there's a bunch of endings that I haven't gotten and there's still places to explore, so maybe this will change, but as is, the plot itself is scattered and vague to a point where it doesn't make a whole lot of sense. The setting is neat and all, but without the lore being solid and making full sense, it's all wasted, because basic questions are just dangling.  The game has a nice variety of weapon types that all feel different, and each one has special attacks you can unlock that aren't just straight upgrades. No weapon type truly falls behind or feels out of place... except for magic.  MP in this game is very limited, even the potions that refill it are, but spells consume too much MP and really don't offer a whole lot of damage output for the cost. Frankly, I find it to be largely useless and just go melee on foes.  Mechanically, the game is fairly alright. You start with a dash that functions both on the ground and in the air, and it can be a back dash as well, for dodging. The air dash is vital, not only for just base movement, but to also dodge and platform. Combined with the double (and later optional triple) jump, you can cover a lot of distance. However, if you really want to add more, you need to do weapon hovering.  I find it easier with the dual blades, but you can attack while in the air and, for a short period, "hover" while still moving, allowing you to cover more distance at whatever height you attacked. It's not very large, but it can be the difference between success and failure. Because trust me, there's a lot of platforming in this game and you WILL need it if you want to get everything, because most of the gear in the game is locked behind them.  Various power ups, called afterimages, are in the game, and a few I feel come a little too late. Such as the ability to move through water, the ability to move through energy barriers that are more annoyance than actually locking you out of anything important... or the optional triple jump. They really needed to be spaced out better.  The dialogue in this game... sure does exist. It's uh... wordy and flowery, is the best way to describe it. Like somebody thinks they know how Tolkien wrote without reading it, and then merged it with Shakespeare. Lots of roundabout ways to say things; it's meant to invoke fantasy and I suppose make it feel like a different world, but it's just annoying.  I swear, if I see one more "mayhaps".,..  There's several different quest chains, but no real quest markers. You just happen to stumble upon the next link in the chain randomly, and then it's off to explore more to maybe find the next link. If you can. These can also seemingly be encountered out of order, from what I can tell, anyway.  Also, I guess I should mention the few unfinished areas. Side areas, nothing important to the main story. It sucks that the game wasn't fully realized, but at least it's not like they just couldn't finish the main story in time.  All in all, this game is worth playing, but not for the story... so far. Again, that opinion could change, but for now, it's worth playing for a large world with a bunch of things to explore and find.

Afterimage is a metroidvania that has a beautiful atmosphere, huge world and hand drawn art style. The areas look really nice and make you want to explore new areas. The feeling getting lost and soaked into this world is this games biggest strenght.  The gameplay feels smooth, the combat is fast and the 6 different weapons with each their own design, combos and style add alot of variety.   Afterimage is not perfect though. The map can feel way too large, the story is also quite confusing and not easy to follow, so you don't know where you have to go next most of the time.   Although I ran in circles alot of times. Afterimage set the mood really good with it's music and beautiful world. Anyone who enjoys exploring, finding secrets and getting lost in a huge fantasy world will find alot of content here.  Great Metroidvania

Como fan del género metroidvania, este juego me parece muy mediocre y no podría recomendárselo a nadie que no esté muy metido en este género de videojuegos. Lo único que me gustó del juego fue el diseño de la protagonista, y también el gameplay, que me parece algo entretenido. Pero de resto, muy poco, la verdad. La música es genérica, los personajes aburridos, la historia me pareció irrelevante al punto que, después de 10 horas, simplemente dejé de leer y me saltaba todos los diálogos... Además, este juego tiene una exploración extremadamente tediosa con unos mapas innecesariamente grandes y vacíos.  Si aun así quieres comprar este juego, te recomiendo que te esperes un descuento; no vale la pena pagar el precio completo por esta cosa.

Лютая смесь Hollow Knight и Genshin Impact.  От мамы Геншина игра переняла лохую подачу сюжета. Базовые механики боёвки сокрыты за гринд-валлом ввиде прокачки. Из-за чего в начале игры ты бегаешь как идиот без возможности парировать/блокировать удары. У тебя даже нету возможности БИТЬ ВЕРХ, что с вертикальностью и летающими противниками превращается в сюр. Дэш в противника наносит тебе урон, но приэтом этот дэш на 5 метров вперёд является единственной сейв мувмент опцией вовремя боя. На красивый внешне визуал приходятся слабенькие анимации врагов(Один из боссов буквально просто стоит перед битвой 5 секунд, и я только с третьего его трая понял что это начальная кат-сцена как в сосаликах, хд). Добавлю что в прокачке помимо открытия каких-то базовых приёмов, уже имеющегося у вас оружия, вы будуте прокачивать +1% крит урона и +2 урона базового оружия. Может быть игра раскрывается в будущем, как минимум потенцивал каких-то билдов на основе оружия и снаряжения виднеется. Но жизнь слишком коротка, что бы впитывать первые часы геёмплея ради 20 минут удовольствия в будущем. Вместо этой игры лучше купите Hollow Knight или Silksong по скидкам :^

기본 엔딩 3개 + 불의 거신 엔딩 3개 NG+엔딩 2개 진엔딩 까지 봤습니다. 일단 이 게임의 장점은 맵이 정말 넓습니다 그렇기에 탐험할 요소와 지역간의 연결구조가 끊임없이 나옵니다. 예를 들면 이 지역에서 구석으로 갔더니 떨어지는곳이 있네? 하고 떨어지면 이전 지역이 나오거나 숏컷이 열립니다. 무기의 종류도 많고 각자의 장단점이 있기 때문에 골라쓰는 재미가 있습니다.  다음으로 이 게임의 단점은 너무 맵이 큽니다 앞어 말했든 지역들의 탐험 요소가 많지만 눈에 바로 들어오지 않는 비밀장소가 대부분 입니다, (특히 성소에서 얼어붙은 수맥 가는길) 맵에 비밀통로는 표시가 되긴 하지만 안되는 비밀장소도 많습니다, 다음은 게임이 너무 불친절합니다, 보스의 패턴 피격판정이 직관적이지 않는 공격이 많고 모르면 맞아야지 식 공격도 많습니다. 또한 쓸데없이 버려지는 공간도 많습니다. 일단 도전과제 올클을 위해 어느정도 시간을 더 쓸것같긴 하지만 메트로베니아를 하겠다면 할로우나이트, 오리 등등 좋은 작품이 많으니 먼저 먹어보고 구매하시는걸 추천드리겠습니다.

TL;DR: 9/10 mechanics, 8/10 progression, 6/10 polish, 2/10 translation. outstanding potential, but doesn't entirely live up to it.  the combat is [b][i]very fun[/i][/b], once you understand the flow. movement is very precise: learn how to crouch-slide (once you unlock it), this is a core movement mechanic. [b][i]every[/i][/b] attack is dodge-able in my experience (and i was using the slowest weapon). bosses have surprisingly unique movesets (i actually enjoyed bossing in this game more than in silksong)  the map is enormous, so stock up on teleports. they're cheap to purchase at home base.  the game world artstyle is beautiful, but the character/overlay art suffers from some stylistic inconsistency. animations are done with 2d rigging, which isn't my personal preference.  the english translation was [b][i]awful[/i][/b] and made the story difficult to follow, but the epilogue content cleared some stuff up.

Após finalmente terminar de platinar esse belo jogo, creio enfim ter propriedade suficiente pra avaliá-lo, pois bem vamos lá.     Afterimage é um excelente metroidvania de entrada, o jogo não é muito dificil, especialmente na reta final, onde ficamos super roubados, e ele também é um jogo super leve rodando a 60 fps lisinho no meu notebook, algumas áreas do jogo no entanto acabam pesando mais o jogo, fazendo o note esquentar mais, mas não é nada que vá queimar algum componente, o jogo também apesar de parecer que vai te deixar perdido na realidade é super intuitivo, é tipo quase sempre assim.    anda, anda, anda, segue as partes escuras no mapa, se tiver inimigo com caveira na cabeça volta e faz outro caminho. É bem simples, o jogo também tem uma penca de coletaveis, alguns tive que até pedir ajuda no reddit pra ver como achava de tão escondidos que tavam.  A platina dele também é bem fácil até de fazer, 70% dela é só matar boss, 10% pegar cada um dos 10 finais do jogo (alias fique tranquilo, dá pra pegar todos em um só save), e os últimos 20% são pura busca pelos coletaveis, que como disse alguns são beem chatos de se encontrar, especialmente sem pedir ajuda.       Em resumo é um jogo nota 8,5/10, vai te divertir com certeza, a estética do jogo é belíssima, minhas únicas reclamações são só que achei o jogo um pouco fácil demais e a história é beeem confusa, foi tipo numa hora tavam num papo de ressuscitar uma mina, e na outra tão lutando com clones, gigantes, e a fauna acreana, tudo isso só pra montar uma máscara e pegar um monte de pedra e ovo.   Enfim é isso, divirtam-se!

Good combat, interesting story, and frustrating but fun design overall; 7.25/10. One of the largest Metroidvanias I've ever played, with a variety of bosses and satisfying progression. Unfortunately, an "open-world" approach in a Metroidvania is one of the worst things they could have done, leading to frequently being massively over or under level with no idea where to go next. If you don't mind using a guide, you'll probably enjoy it more, but I prefer not to. Combat is great except for one failing: There's no realistic way to avoid taking damage, no true parry mechanic, and the few weapons that can "parry" limit your build choices.

[h1] 如果不是在这里写差评会让我不断的回忆游玩经历我一定会写很多字的 [/h1]  在仓库待了很久忽然发现了就又拿出玩了，开始玩5分钟就让我想起来我为什么没有玩。现在就是恨当时没有立刻退款。  下蹲无法移动，闪避没有无敌帧，70%平台的需要大跳，谜一样的引导和剧情。因为以上的一些原因地图也变得极其恶心，明明宝箱很近但是因为蹲下无法移动就是会被卡住，跳跃平台看起来能跳上实际上需要绕路，短跳几乎躲不了上去不任何东西任何地方。至于剧情我不想说，我这个游戏时间也没什么好说剧情的。操作体验极其恶心，我是说恶心，没有故意这样设计很难达到这种恶心程度。 以上情况在我游玩了2个小时，实际不算死在路上和迷路重复大概是1个小时的内容推进后还是没有任何任何任何的缓解，我实在忍不了了隧差评  我无法理解我一个小时的体验到底是什么，极其恶心，虽然已经说过了但是我忍不住必须再说几遍，实在是恶心人的体验，我现在回想起来都觉得恶心。    在写完之后我去看了很多攻略和讲解，但是一想到那样子的游戏体验我就不想点开这个游戏，如果不是这游戏并不便宜我可能已经把它移除我的游戏库了。

더빙도 영어,중국어,일본어의 3개국어. 맵도 무진장 넓은것 같고? 열심히 만든듯 해보이지만..  40분 정도 플레이하다 더이상 못하겠더라.  난 도저히 이 게임의 컨셉을 알 수가 없다. 컨셉을 알 수 없으니 흥미가 생기질 않는다. 주인공은 누구인가? 어떤 사람이지? 내 곁을 따라다니는 사역마는 또 정체가 뭔데? 모험을 하는 이유나 목적, 이 세상에 대한 설명, 왜 이런 몬스터가 생겨났고 싸워야만 하는가?  아트에 대한 칭찬들이 있던데, 내 감상으로는 예쁘다기보다 뭔가 좋아보이는 것들을 조잡하게 펼쳐놓은 이도저도 아닌 아트다. 조잡하고 칙칙하다. 이 게임의 아이덴티티를 전혀 느낄 수 없었다.  스토리가 별로거나, 백번 양보해서 스토리가 신비주의 컨셉이라면, 아트나 게임성이라도 좋아야 계속하는 맛이 날텐데. 앞서 말했듯이 아트도 내 스타일이 아니고, 전투는 재미가 없고. 메트로베니아인데 위 공격이 없어서 조작감도 구리고,재미도 없는 능력치 찍기는 왜 이렇게 세분화 되있는지도 의문이고.

打通关了（多结局），最终评分6/10（及格，可以玩下去）。  整体风格更像是披着类银皮的日式ARPG（比如《伊苏》），玩完我就1个感觉，各方面都比较平庸，但体量确实大。怎么说呢，这感觉就好像我想吃一道美味的菜，但是端上来一筐馒头，虽然能吃饱乃至撑，但不是很开心和满足。  相比用爱做出来的优秀类银（比如《空洞骑士》《神之亵渎》），这游戏就像个工业流水线快餐。  1）地图设计：6/10 优点： 地图多，各场景互相连接，在突然遇到时还是有一定惊喜和探索感的；  另外地图支持重要信息自动标记和自定义标记，比较方便探索。同时还会标记出一些隐藏通道以及安装了寻宝后像后会提示收集品数量，比较方便收集。  缺点： 地图过大，内容空洞/重复，导致乏味。玩到第2个地图时就发现好像差不多，有种换皮的感觉； 另外很多隐藏位置找到的东西，都没什么卵用，缺少惊喜。  2）剧情：6/10 主线结局和支线任务很多，这点不错，在全地图开启后，让我有一定持续收集和解谜的动力。最后我打通了主角3个结局，伊芙3个结局，42线的2个结局，最后网上云视频了剩余2个结局（含真结局）。  不过整体感觉下来，只能说世界观/剧情故事还是简单直白了点，缺少深度/悬念和吸引力。相比之下，在玩空洞骑士和神之亵渎时，我会好奇世界观和故事，但是这个游戏我就没什么好奇的感觉。  3）战斗：5/10 感觉像是披着类银皮的ARPG，有种在玩日式游戏（比如《伊苏》）的感觉，机动性很高。  属性/能力/装备很多，但是感觉没什么太大的区别，纯数值变化。 战斗过程没什么策略性/挑战/亮点，无论是小怪还是boss，我都没留下什么印象，应对模式基本都可以靠数值或者嗑药硬拼，所以感觉没什么意思。 另外没有红冲后像之前，冲刺竟然有碰撞伤害？ 让我想避开小怪节省点跑图时间都不行，真够蛋疼的。  4）画面/音乐：6/10 中规中矩，不是很有亮点。 画面颜色艳丽但是一股页游风格，并且有时候有点看不清人物。 音乐就某几个区域的背景音乐听到有感觉还不错，其他区域都没啥感觉。   综上，也就6分吧，不过现在py上key很便宜，就不到10块钱（我是4块钱入手的），便宜可以入手，玩玩感受下水平一般的类银是什么样的，或者作为手残党的类银入门作品。
手感不是很好，地图设计不怎么样。

美术人设立绘出彩，但地型小怪boss设计廉价感很重，画面表现有不少光污染； 内容量大管饱，但作为类银来讲，战斗系统被多余的武器收集和等级系统搞得冗杂且累赘，上劈下劈只有特定武器触发，搓招手感变扭，虽然有双刀，武士刀，长剑，大剑，镰刀，长鞭来选择主副武器搭配，但实际上不管怎么搭配，除了双刀，其他都难用。各种等级的武器属于道具收集品，很多时候是解密探索完了一片区域，拿个完全不需要的武器，体验挺糟的。 总而言之，游戏是挺好玩的，但是只推荐类银爱好者尝尝咸淡。

9 / 10. The 50h exporation metroidania  To be honest, Afterimage is first and foremost an exploration game with very good metroidvania and tight platformer elements. This game is big and the exploration elements do it justice. Couple this with very beautiful and rather unique art style and you have a game that at least needs to be admired. Sound, music and voice acting is also up there and it complements the visual elements very well.  Gameplay wise, this is a typical metroidvania game with some distinct elements, but I cannot say I've seen anything too outstanding here. It does copy some other known games from the genre, but it mostly has it's unique feeling. It features a skill tree, some permanent abilities and some passives, besides the usual equipment.  Now, what makes this game a hit or miss is balancing. You can go 30+ hours in the game and still be at about 10% of the total achievements. That is because there are 8 endings and for the "true" endings you would require certain objects. Now, this is where the game drags on for about 10-20 hours. There are a number of high-level optional areas that don't add too much to the table gameplay wise. Yes, the art style is beautiful, but there's not that much content there. You mostly unlock all but 2 abilities by this point and getting the last two, to then grind for everything is not that fun. Doing 100% on this game is kind of annoying and will require a good map, as there are a lot of hidden or puzzle areas that do not appear on the map. There will be a helper skill at a certain point, but it's not all that useful.  Still on the balancing side, bosses are rather easy for the most part (with some exceptions) and you can beat them even if they are 30+ levels above you. I've picked up so, so many potions throughout the game, but I never got to spend the all basic health potions. There's also a way to put items on the hotkeys, but besides that basic health potion, I haven't used anything else throughout the game. Magic would be powerful, but mana regeneration is a pain. It probably would be possible to do a mage build, but then you will loose on the +Drop Rate or +Exp Gain items, that are essential for 100%.  After beating the game, there is a thing called New Game+, but it's anything but that. Instead it is a small side story of about 1h, that unlocks area in the main game and also a few new endings.  Overall I found Afterimage to be a game that does it's own things in a surprisingly high quality manner and that's why I'm willing to go past it's balancing issues, as it does serve a solid experience.  Other recommendations: - some metroidvanias with something different going for them: Dust: An Elysian Tail, the Shantae series, the Guacamelee games, Cave Story+ - a weird mix of different genres: Dex - the classics: Bloodstained: Ritual of the Night, Castlevania: Down of Sorrow (and most of the metroidvania part of the series), Super Metroid - the art-style reminds me of some anime fighting games: BlazBlue: Calamity Trigger, the Guilty Gear series (and other Arc System Works games) - wildly different, but great story and unique mechanics: Jade Empire

Was dieses Spiel absolut richtig macht ist das Worldbuilding! Eine wunderschöne und fantasievolle Welt haben die Entwickler erschaffen. Und einen wunderbaren Soundtrack gibt es noch obendrein und es ist komplett vertont! Und ja die Welt ist wirklich sehr groß und vielfältig. Die verschiedenen Waffen sorgen für viel Abwechslung. Für jeden Spielstil ist etwas dabei. Das Parieren mit dem Großschwert gefällt mir sehr!   Was mir nicht gefällt sind die Hitboxen einiger Projektile und Gegner die größer sind als sie scheinen. Das tracking von fliegenden Gegner und Gegnern die Projektile feuern ist in meinen Augen zu genau, auch wenn man lernen kann damit besser umzugehen.  Mir ist aufgefallen, dass einige Gegner den Spieler sogar bereits tracken, wenn man sie noch nicht mal gesehen hat oder gerade erst dabei ist ein Arial zu betreten. Besonders ist es schade, dass selbst wenn man mit einem riesigen 2 h Schwert einen kleinen (fliegenden) Gegner schlägt, dieser kein Stück zurückweicht, stattdessen bewegt er sich einfach weiter in einen hinein und gibt Kontaktschaden. Kontaktschaden finde ich generell nicht verkehrt. Ich glaube nicht, dass die Macher noch einmal etwas daran ändern werden, aber ich würde mich freuen, wenn sie es täten.  Selbst bei Hollowknight gab es ja vor kurzem noch neue Anpassungen und fixes, also kann man nur hoffen!  Weiterspielen, werde ich es auf jeden fall.

[b]Afterimage[/b] is an ambitious title that offers an impressive amount of content, but it lacks polish in several key areas. It is a very beautiful game that just misses the "masterpiece" mark due to a series of small negative points that weigh down the overall experience. [i]Note: This review is based on a playthrough on normal mode, but the game also offers a hard mode.[/i]  [h2]1. Exploration and Map[/h2] [b]+[/b] The incredible scale and that sense of "how big is this game?" every time you open a new area is very satisfying. The map is graphically very clear, and markers are available from the start. [b]-[/b] Backtracking is a nightmare due to the lack of fast travel points. You never know where to go: it’s fine at the beginning, but with 10 open quests and nearly useless log entries, you feel completely lost and forced to rely on guides. In the endgame, there are no charms or abilities to show unvisited secret areas; again, guides are mandatory. Additionally, even towards the end of the game, there is no way to speed up horizontal exploration, making traversing long distances feel tedious. [i]More fast travel points and quest markers on the map would have been enough.[/i]  [h2]2. Combat System and Arsenal[/h2] [b]+[/b] Excellent fluidity, plenty of different weapons, armor, and sub-weapons that allow for varied builds. [b]-[/b] Many items have stats that are too parametric and poorly explained. For example, there are 3 types of attack stats that the game doesn't explain well, forcing you to do constant in-game testing.  [h2]3. Story, Endings and NG+[/h2] [b]+[/b] The game features multiple endings and a very deep lore.  [b]-[/b] Seeing all the endings without a guide is virtually impossible due to the cryptic requirements. [b]Note on NG+:[/b] [spoiler]It is not a traditional NG+. Instead, it is a parallel story featuring another playable character. You don't start from scratch; you play through 10 short chapters that complete and expand the main plot.[/spoiler]  [h2]4. Characters and Quests[/h2] [b]+[/b] A world with a solid story and characters that expand the universe. [b]-[/b] The narrative is a bit confusing and excessive. Some characters seem to have no real purpose anymore,  due to cut content. [i]Removing some lines of text and redundant characters would have helped.[/i]  [h2]5. Bosses and Enemies[/h2] [b]+[/b] Incredible enemy variety and visually spectacular bosses. Physical hitboxes are actually very well done. [b]-[/b] Some enemy attacks are placed in low corridors where you cannot jump, making them nearly impossible to avoid. Projectile hitboxes for some bosses feel inconsistent with the animations and unnecessarily punishing.  [h2]6. Technical Performance[/h2] [b]+[/b] The game is solid: perfect support for ultrawide monitors and no technical issues or bugs encountered. Esthetically, it’s a very clean gem.  [h1]Conclusion[/h1] A massive and rewarding experience for those who have a lot of patience and don't mind consulting external wikis, but it would have greatly benefited from more attention to QOL.

Quiero escribir esta reseña no solamente como un simple análisis del juego, sino de una experiencia real que juegos, que obras como esta, provocan en un porcentaje de jugadores.   Empecé este juego hace años en otra etapa de mi vida, en la que la adultez empezaba a formar parte de mi vida. Fue en una Nintendo Switch cuando el juego recién salió, y por distintas circunstancias, lo dejé como a 1/3 de la historia y con 40 horas de juego. Hace un año, adquirí una Steam Deck, y no se como exactamente tome la decisión de volver a comprar este juego ahí, lo que implicaba volver a retomar el juego desde cero, cosa que al final hice. Siempre le tuve fe a este juego, pese a las opiniones divididas que rondaban por ahí, en primera por mi ligera experiencia en videojuegos de este género, y en segunda, porque el juego ya me habia enganchado, además de que sentía que debía terminar lo que ya habia empezado. Asi pues, de a poco recién tuve la oportunidad de terminarlo al 100% y platinarlo, y es impresionante la cantidad de detalles y atención que tiene este juego.   Afterimage recompensa al tipo de jugador que se interesa por explorar y descubrir todos los secretos, es una joya oculta que recompensa a quien la busca y a quien está dispuesto a insistir. El mapa es grandísimo y está lleno de exploración, pero cuando dominas bien el gameplay moverte por este se siente como ser "pez en el agua". Su combate también es enriquecedor, si no te convence un estilo de combate, tienes muchas opciones para elegir y combinar, y cuando por fin lo logras dominar, luchar y moverte se siente como estar en una coreografía. Sientes una sensación de progreso real en el juego, nunca dejas de obtener algo nuevo que agrega variedad y diversifica el estilo de juego del jugador.   Pero más allá del juego en sí, lo que realmente me dejó fue otra cosa. Es un juego que me acompañó durante años y me hizo volver a empezarlo solo para cumplir y superar mis expectativas. Este objetivo personal que me ♥♥♥♥ de terminar algo que comencé hace tres años, me hizo reflexionar que un videojuego puede estar contigo en diferentes etapas de tu vida, no importa el contexto, si estas en momentos difíciles, momentos de adaptación, transición o de paz, siempre van a estar ahí acompañándote y recompensandote por la atención que les pones al jugarlos, y sobretodo, al disfrutarlos.   Puede que este juego no haya recibido la atención que merece, pero para mí, más que un juegazo se queda como algo más: una experiencia que me acompañó mientras cambiaba con el tiempo… y que al final, sí que valió la pena.
